Reading Mode
This page keeps the whole session intact while making long transcripts easier to scan.
  • Messages stay in left/right conversation bubbles.
  • Tool calls and results are folded by default.
  • Reasoning steps remain visible without leaking encrypted content.
  • Context, task state, and token counters stay in the timeline for auditability.

Use the controls to focus on one slice of the session: human prompts, assistant output, tool traffic, reasoning markers, or system context. The raw structure is preserved without forcing everything into one flat blob.

Implement the following plan: # Plan: 移植 packages/report/ 到 openmnemo monorepo ## Context memorytree-workflow skill 的 `src/report/` 模块已完整实现（640 tests 全绿），包含完整的看板生成、i18n、图表、知识图谱、部署等功能。openmnemo monorepo 的 `packages/` 下...

Expand full message

Implement the following plan:

# Plan: 移植 packages/report/ 到 openmnemo monorepo

## Context

memorytree-workflow skill 的 src/report/ 模块已完整实现（640 tests 全绿），包含完整的看板生成、i18n、图表、知识图谱、部署等功能。openmnemo monorepo 的 packages/ 下目前没有 report 包，技术路线图将其标为 P0 任务。目标：将 skill 的 report 功能提升为 @openmnemo/report 独立包，并接入 CLI。

---

## 文件来源映射

| skill 路径 | monorepo 目标 | 变化 |
|-----------|--------------|------|
| src/report/build.ts | packages/report/src/build.ts | 改 3 处 import |
| src/report/stats.ts | packages/report/src/stats.ts | 改 2 处 import |
| src/report/summarize.ts | packages/report/src/summarize.ts | 改 2 处 import |
| src/report/tags.ts | packages/report/src/tags.ts | 改 2 处 import |
| src/report/render/.ts（16 文件） | packages/report/src/render/.ts | 无需改动（相对 import） |
| src/report/deploy/.ts（2 文件） | packages/report/src/deploy/.ts | 改 1 处 import（log） |
| src/report/i18n/.ts（4 文件） | packages/report/src/i18n/.ts | 无需改动 |
| src/types/report.ts | packages/report/src/types.ts | 文件名变，import 从 transcript 改 |
| src/cli/cmd-report.ts | packages/cli/src/cmd-report.ts | 改 import 来源 |

---

## Import 替换规则（系统性）

| 旧 import（skill） | 新 import（monorepo） | 影响文件 |
|-------------------|---------------------|---------|
| from '../heartbeat/log.js' | from '../log.js' | build.ts, summarize.ts, tags.ts |
| from '../../heartbeat/log.js' | from '../log.js' | deploy/*.ts |
| from '../types/report.js' | from '../types.js' | build.ts, stats.ts, summarize.ts, tags.ts |
| from '../../types/report.js' | from '../types.js' | render/.ts, deploy/.ts |
| from '../types/transcript.js' | from '@openmnemo/types' | build.ts, stats.ts, render/*.ts |
| from '../../types/transcript.js' | from '@openmnemo/types' | render/projects.ts 等 |
| from '../i18n/types.js' | 无变化（相对路径正确） | render/*.ts |

---

## 实现步骤

### Step 1 — 更新 @openmnemo/types

文件： packages/types/src/index.ts

- 将 Client 加入 'doubao'：

  export type Client = 'codex' | 'claude' | 'gemini' | 'doubao'

### Step 2 — 更新 @openmnemo/sync config

文件： packages/sync/src/config.ts

在 Config interface 加 6 个字段，在 parseRaw() 加对应默认值：

readonly generate_report: boolean     // 默认 false
readonly locale: string               // 默认 'en'
readonly ai_summary_model: string     // 默认 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001'
readonly gh_pages_branch: string      // 默认 ''
readonly cname: string                // 默认 ''
readonly webhook_url: string          // 默认 ''
readonly report_base_url: string      // 默认 ''

### Step 3 — 创建 packages/report/

新建文件：

packages/report/
  package.json          ← name: @openmnemo/report, dep: @openmnemo/types, @anthropic-ai/sdk
  tsconfig.json         ← 与其他包一致（NodeNext, strict, noUncheckedIndexedAccess）
  src/
    index.ts            ← export { buildReport } from './build.js'; export type { BuildReportOptions } from './types.js'
    log.ts              ← 最小 logger（不依赖外部包，console + timestamp prefix）
    types.ts            ← 从 skill src/types/report.ts 直接复制，import ManifestEntry 改为 @openmnemo/types
    build.ts            ← 按 import 替换规则改 3 处
    stats.ts            ← 按替换规则改 2 处
    summarize.ts        ← 按替换规则改 2 处
    tags.ts             ← 按替换规则改 2 处
    i18n/               ← 4 文件直接复制，无需改动
    render/             ← 16 文件直接复制，需扫描是否有 transcript.js import
    deploy/             ← 2 文件，改 log.js import 路径

packages/report/package.json：

{
  "name": "@openmnemo/report",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "type": "module",
  "main": "dist/index.js",
  "types": "dist/index.d.ts",
  "scripts": {
    "build": "tsup src/index.ts --format esm --dts",
    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@openmnemo/types": "workspace:*",
    "@anthropic-ai/sdk": "^0.39.0"
  }
}

packages/report/src/log.ts（新建，无外部依赖）：

export interface Logger {
  debug(msg: string): void
  info(msg: string): void
  warn(msg: string): void
  error(msg: string): void
}
export function getLogger(): Logger {
  const prefix = () => new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 19).replace('T', ' ')
  return {
    debug: (m) => console.debug(`${prefix()} [DEBUG] ${m}`),
    info:  (m) => console.info(`${prefix()} [INFO]  ${m}`),
    warn:  (m) => console.warn(`${prefix()} [WARN]  ${m}`),
    error: (m) => console.error(`${prefix()} [ERROR] ${m}`),
  }
}

### Step 4 — 更新 packages/cli/

packages/cli/package.json： 加 "@openmnemo/report": "workspace:*" 依赖

新建 packages/cli/src/cmd-report.ts： 从 skill src/cli/cmd-report.ts 移植，import 改为 @openmnemo/report

修改 packages/cli/src/main.ts： 加 report build 子命令，调用 cmd-report.ts

### Step 5 — 构建与验证

cd D:/demo1/openmnemo
pnpm build                    # 全量构建（turbo 拓扑顺序）

# 手动测试
node packages/cli/dist/main.js report build \
  --root D:/demo1/openmnemo \
  --output D:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/07_reports \
  --no-ai

# 验证输出
ls D:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/07_reports/   # 应有 index.html, graph.html, transcripts/, ...

---

## 关键依赖关系

@openmnemo/types  ← 加 'doubao'
       ↑
@openmnemo/core
       ↑
@openmnemo/sync   ← 加 report config 字段
       ↑
@openmnemo/report ← 新建，读 Memory/ 生成静态 HTML
       ↑
@openmnemo/cli    ← 加 report build 命令

@openmnemo/report 不依赖 sync，只依赖 types + @anthropic-ai/sdk（可选）。

---

## 不在本次范围内

- 移植 skill 的 tests/report/* 测试（量大，单独任务）
- 实现 openmnemo report serve（静态 HTTP 服务器）
- 心跳触发自动 report（heartbeat.ts 改动）

     7→## Architecture
     8→- NodeNext ESM TypeScript, strict mode + `noUncheckedIndexedAccess` + `exactOptionalPropertyTypes`
     9→- All imports need `.js` extension (e.g., `from './stats.js'`)
    10→- Tests in `tests/` with Vitest, mock `node:os` homedir to tmpdir
    11→- Build with `tsup`, entry: `src/cli/main.ts` → `dist/cli.js`
    12→
    13→## Report Module v2 (2026-03-16)
    14→- `src/types/report.ts` — BuildReportOptions has locale/ghPagesBranch/cname/webhookUrl/newSessionIds
    15→- `src/report/build.ts` — orchestrator: all new pages + deploy/webhook integration
    16→- `src/report/i18n/` — types.ts (Translations), en.ts, zh-CN.ts, index.ts (loadLocale)
    17→- `src/report/render/` — css, layout (sidebar+theme+popover JS), charts, dashboard, transcript-list (client tabs), transcript, knowledge, goals, todos, archive, projects, graph, search, links, markdown
    18→- `src/report/deploy/` — github-pages.ts (git subtree push), webhook.ts (feishu/telegram/discord/slack/generic)

    22→- `generate_report: boolean` (default: false)
    23→- `ai_summary_model: string` (default: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001')
    24→- `locale: string` (default: 'en', supports 'zh-CN')
    25→- `gh_pages_branch: string` (default: '' = skip deploy)
    26→- `cname: string` (default: '' = no CNAME file)
    27→- `webhook_url: string` (default: '' = no webhook)
    28→
    29→## Layout (v2)
    30→- Sidebar nav (240px fixed), hamburger on mobile (<768px), theme toggle (dark/light)
    31→- localStorage key `mt-theme`, dark default, light theme via `[data-theme="light"]`
    32→- Popover preview: `data-summary` + `data-meta` on session links
    33→- htmlShell now accepts `lang` param (5th arg)
    34→
    35→## Clean Markdown Format

    37→- Section: `## Messages`
    38→- Per message: `### N. role\n- Timestamp: \`ISO\`\n\ntext`

Read output=1→/** 2→ * Load, validate, and manage ~/.memorytree/config.toml. 3→ * Port of scripts/_config_utils.py 4→ */ 5→ 6→import { existsSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, mkdirSync } f...
Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * Load, validate, and manage ~/.memorytree/config.toml.
     3→ * Port of scripts/_config_utils.py
     4→ */
     5→
     6→import { existsSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, mkdirSync } from 'node:fs'
     7→import { homedir } from 'node:os'
     8→import { dirname, resolve } from 'node:path'
     9→
    10→import { parse as parseToml } from 'smol-toml'
    11→
    12→import { toPosixPath } from '@openmnemo/core'
    13→
    14→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    15→// Constants
    16→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    17→
    18→const DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL = '5m'
    19→const DEFAULT_AUTO_PUSH = true
    20→const DEFAULT_LOG_LEVEL = 'info'
    21→const VALID_LOG_LEVELS: ReadonlySet<string> = new Set(['debug', 'info', 'warn', 'error'])
    22→
    23→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    24→// Types
    25→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    26→
    27→export interface ProjectEntry {
    28→  readonly path: string
    29→  readonly name: string
    30→}
    31→
    32→export interface Config {
    33→  readonly heartbeat_interval: string
    34→  readonly watch_dirs: readonly string[]
    35→  readonly projects: readonly ProjectEntry[]
    36→  readonly auto_push: boolean
    37→  readonly log_level: string
    38→}
    39→
    40→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    41→// Path helpers
    42→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    43→
    44→export function memorytreeRoot(): string {
    45→  return resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree')
    46→}
    47→
    48→export function configPath(): string {
    49→  return resolve(memorytreeRoot(), 'config.toml')
    50→}
    51→
    52→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    53→// Load / Save
    54→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    55→
    56→export function loadConfig(): Config {
    57→  const path = configPath()
    58→  if (!existsSync(path)) {
    59→    return defaultConfig()
    60→  }
    61→  let raw: Record<string, unknown>
    62→  try {
    63→    const text = readFileSync(path, 'utf-8')
    64→    raw = parseToml(text) as Record<string, unknown>
    65→  } catch {
    66→    return defaultConfig()
    67→  }
    68→  return parseRaw(raw)
    69→}
    70→
    71→export function saveConfig(cfg: Config): void {
    72→  const path = configPath()
    73→  mkdirSync(dirname(path), { recursive: true })
    74→
    75→  const lines: string[] = [
    76→    `heartbeat_interval = ${tomlString(cfg.heartbeat_interval)}`,
    77→    `auto_push = ${cfg.auto_push ? 'true' : 'false'}`,
    78→    `log_level = ${tomlString(cfg.log_level)}`,
    79→  ]
    80→
    81→  if (cfg.watch_dirs.length > 0) {
    82→    const items = cfg.watch_dirs.map(d => tomlString(d)).join(', ')
    83→    lines.push(`watch_dirs = [${items}]`)
    84→  } else {
    85→    lines.push('watch_dirs = []')
    86→  }
    87→
    88→  lines.push('')
    89→  for (const project of cfg.projects) {
    90→    lines.push('[[projects]]')
    91→    lines.push(`path = ${tomlString(project.path)}`)
    92→    if (project.name) {
    93→      lines.push(`name = ${tomlString(project.name)}`)
    94→    }
    95→    lines.push('')
    96→  }
    97→
    98→  writeFileSync(path, lines.join('\n') + '\n', 'utf-8')
    99→}
   100→
   101→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   102→// Interval parsing
   103→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   104→
   105→export function intervalToSeconds(interval: string): number {
   106→  const match = interval.trim().toLowerCase().match(/^(\d+)\s*(s|m|h)$/)
   107→  if (!match) {
   108→    return intervalToSeconds(DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL)
   109→  }
   110→  const value = parseInt(match[1]!, 10)
   111→  const unit = match[2]!
   112→  if (value <= 0) {
   113→    return intervalToSeconds(DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL)
   114→  }
   115→  const multiplier: Record<string, number> = { s: 1, m: 60, h: 3600 }
   116→  return value * (multiplier[unit] ?? 60)
   117→}
   118→
   119→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   120→// Project registration
   121→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   122→
   123→export function registerProject(cfg: Config, repoPath: string): Config {
   124→  const resolved = toPosixPath(resolve(repoPath))
   125→  for (const entry of cfg.projects) {
   126→    if (toPosixPath(resolve(entry.path)) === resolved) {
   127→      return cfg
   128→    }
   129→  }
   130→  const name = resolved.split('/').pop() ?? ''
   131→  return {
   132→    ...cfg,
   133→    projects: [...cfg.projects, { path: resolved, name }],
   134→  }
   135→}
   136→
   137→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   138→// Internal helpers
   139→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   140→
   141→function defaultConfig(): Config {
   142→  return {
   143→    heartbeat_interval: DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL,
   144→    watch_dirs: [],
   145→    projects: [],
   146→    auto_push: DEFAULT_AUTO_PUSH,
   147→    log_level: DEFAULT_LOG_LEVEL,
   148→  }
   149→}
   150→
   151→function parseRaw(raw: Record<string, unknown>): Config {
   152→  let interval = raw['heartbeat_interval']
   153→  if (typeof interval !== 'string' || !isValidInterval(interval)) {
   154→    interval = DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL
   155→  }
   156→
   157→  let autoPush = raw['auto_push']
   158→  if (typeof autoPush !== 'boolean') {
   159→    autoPush = DEFAULT_AUTO_PUSH
   160→  }
   161→
   162→  let logLevel = raw['log_level']
   163→  if (typeof logLevel !== 'string' || !VALID_LOG_LEVELS.has(logLevel.toLowerCase())) {
   164→    logLevel = DEFAULT_LOG_LEVEL
   165→  }
   166→  logLevel = (logLevel as string).toLowerCase()
   167→
   168→  const watchDirs: string[] = []
   169→  const rawDirs = raw['watch_dirs']
   170→  if (Array.isArray(rawDirs)) {
   171→    for (const d of rawDirs) {
   172→      if (typeof d === 'string') watchDirs.push(d)
   173→    }
   174→  }
   175→
   176→  const projects: ProjectEntry[] = []
   177→  const rawProjects = raw['projects']
   178→  if (Array.isArray(rawProjects)) {
   179→    for (const entry of rawProjects) {
   180→      if (entry !== null && typeof entry === 'object' && !Array.isArray(entry)) {
   181→        const rec = entry as Record<string, unknown>
   182→        if (typeof rec['path'] === 'string') {
   183→          projects.push({
   184→            path: rec['path'] as string,
   185→            name: String(rec['name'] ?? ''),
   186→          })
   187→        }
   188→      }
   189→    }
   190→  }
   191→
   192→  return {
   193→    heartbeat_interval: interval as string,
   194→    watch_dirs: watchDirs,
   195→    projects,
   196→    auto_push: autoPush as boolean,
   197→    log_level: logLevel as string,
   198→  }
   199→}
   200→
   201→function isValidInterval(value: string): boolean {
   202→  const match = value.trim().toLowerCase().match(/^(\d+)\s*(s|m|h)$/)
   203→  if (!match) return false
   204→  return parseInt(match[1]!, 10) > 0
   205→}
   206→
   207→function tomlString(value: string): string {
   208→  const escaped = value.replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/"/g, '\\"')
   209→  return `"${escaped}"`
   210→}
   211→

Read output=1→/** 2→ * MemoryTree CLI — unified entry point. 3→ * Registers all subcommands via commander. 4→ */ 5→ 6→import { Command } from 'commander' 7→ 8→const program = new Command() ...
Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * MemoryTree CLI — unified entry point.
     3→ * Registers all subcommands via commander.
     4→ */
     5→
     6→import { Command } from 'commander'
     7→
     8→const program = new Command()
     9→
    10→program
    11→  .name('memorytree')
    12→  .description('MemoryTree — transcript import, dedup, indexing, and session continuity')
    13→  .version('0.1.0')
    14→
    15→// ── init ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    16→
    17→program
    18→  .command('init')
    19→  .description('Initialize a MemoryTree workspace in a repository')
    20→  .option('--root <path>', 'Target repository root', '.')
    21→  .option('--project-name <name>', 'Project name', 'this project')
    22→  .option('--goal-summary <text>', 'Initial goal summary', 'Describe the long-term project goal here.')
    23→  .option('--locale <locale>', 'Template locale: auto, en, or zh-cn', 'auto')
    24→  .option('--date <date>', 'Override date as YYYY-MM-DD')
    25→  .option('--time <time>', 'Override time as HH:MM')
    26→  .option('--skip-agents', 'Deprecated — use upgrade instead')
    27→  .option('--force', 'Overwrite existing generated files')
    28→  .action(async (opts) => {
    29→    const { cmdInit } = await import('./cmd-init.js')
    30→    process.exitCode = cmdInit({
    31→      root: opts.root,
    32→      projectName: opts.projectName,
    33→      goalSummary: opts.goalSummary,
    34→      locale: opts.locale,
    35→      date: opts.date ?? '',
    36→      time: opts.time ?? '',
    37→      skipAgents: opts.skipAgents ?? false,
    38→      force: opts.force ?? false,
    39→    })
    40→  })
    41→
    42→// ── upgrade ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    43→
    44→program
    45→  .command('upgrade')
    46→  .description('Upgrade a repository to MemoryTree without overwriting existing policy')
    47→  .option('--root <path>', 'Target repository root', '.')
    48→  .option('--project-name <name>', 'Project name', 'this project')
    49→  .option('--goal-summary <text>', 'Fallback goal summary', 'Describe the long-term project goal here.')
    50→  .option('--locale <locale>', 'Requested locale: auto, en, or zh-cn', 'auto')
    51→  .option('--date <date>', 'Override date as YYYY-MM-DD')
    52→  .option('--time <time>', 'Override time as HH:MM')
    53→  .option('--format <format>', 'Output format: text or json', 'text')
    54→  .action(async (opts) => {
    55→    const { cmdUpgrade } = await import('./cmd-upgrade.js')
    56→    process.exitCode = cmdUpgrade({
    57→      root: opts.root,
    58→      projectName: opts.projectName,
    59→      goalSummary: opts.goalSummary,
    60→      locale: opts.locale,
    61→      date: opts.date ?? '',
    62→      time: opts.time ?? '',
    63→      format: opts.format,
    64→    })
    65→  })
    66→
    67→// ── import ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    68→
    69→program
    70→  .command('import')
    71→  .description('Import one local transcript into MemoryTree archives')
    72→  .requiredOption('--source <path>', 'Raw transcript source file path')
    73→  .option('--root <path>', 'Target repository root', '.')
    74→  .option('--client <client>', 'Transcript client: auto, codex, claude, gemini', 'auto')
    75→  .option('--project-name <name>', 'Project label', '')
    76→  .option('--global-root <path>', 'Override global transcript root')
    77→  .option('--raw-upload-permission <perm>', 'Permission: not-set, approved, denied', 'not-set')
    78→  .option('--format <format>', 'Output format: text or json', 'text')
    79→  .action(async (opts) => {
    80→    const { cmdImport } = await import('./cmd-import.js')
    81→    process.exitCode = await cmdImport({
    82→      root: opts.root,
    83→      source: opts.source,
    84→      client: opts.client,
    85→      projectName: opts.projectName,
    86→      globalRoot: opts.globalRoot ?? '',
    87→      rawUploadPermission: opts.rawUploadPermission,
    88→      format: opts.format,
    89→    })
    90→  })
    91→
    92→// ── discover ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    93→
    94→program
    95→  .command('discover')
    96→  .description('Discover and import local AI transcripts')
    97→  .option('--root <path>', 'Target repository root', '.')
    98→  .option('--client <client>', 'Client filter: all, codex, claude, gemini', 'all')
    99→  .option('--scope <scope>', 'Scope: current-project or all-projects', 'all-projects')
   100→  .option('--project-name <name>', 'Project label', '')
   101→  .option('--global-root <path>', 'Override global transcript root')
   102→  .option('--raw-upload-permission <perm>', 'Permission: not-set, approved, denied', 'not-set')
   103→  .option('--limit <n>', 'Limit discovered sources', '0')
   104→  .option('--format <format>', 'Output format: text or json', 'text')
   105→  .action(async (opts) => {
   106→    const { cmdDiscover } = await import('./cmd-discover.js')
   107→    process.exitCode = await cmdDiscover({
   108→      root: opts.root,
   109→      client: opts.client,
   110→      scope: opts.scope,
   111→      projectName: opts.projectName,
   112→      globalRoot: opts.globalRoot ?? '',
   113→      rawUploadPermission: opts.rawUploadPermission,
   114→      limit: parseInt(opts.limit, 10) || 0,
   115→      format: opts.format,
   116→    })
   117→  })
   118→
   119→// ── locale ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   120→
   121→program
   122→  .command('locale')
   123→  .description('Detect the effective locale for a repository')
   124→  .option('--root <path>', 'Target repository root', '.')
   125→  .option('--locale <locale>', 'Requested locale value', 'auto')
   126→  .option('--format <format>', 'Output format: text or json', 'text')
   127→  .action(async (opts) => {
   128→    const { cmdLocale } = await import('./cmd-locale.js')
   129→    process.exitCode = cmdLocale({
   130→      root: opts.root,
   131→      locale: opts.locale,
   132→      format: opts.format,
   133→    })
   134→  })
   135→
   136→// ── recall ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   137→
   138→program
   139→  .command('recall')
   140→  .description('On-demand transcript sync and latest session recall')
   141→  .option('--root <path>', 'Target repository root', '.')
   142→  .option('--project-name <name>', 'Project label', '')
   143→  .option('--global-root <path>', 'Override global transcript root')
   144→  .option('--activation-time <time>', 'ISO timestamp of session activation')
   145→  .option('--format <format>', 'Output format: text or json', 'text')
   146→  .action(async (opts) => {
   147→    const { cmdRecall } = await import('./cmd-recall.js')
   148→    process.exitCode = await cmdRecall({
   149→      root: opts.root,
   150→      projectName: opts.projectName,
   151→      globalRoot: opts.globalRoot ?? '',
   152→      activationTime: opts.activationTime ?? '',
   153→      format: opts.format,
   154→    })
   155→  })
   156→
   157→// ── daemon ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   158→
   159→const daemon = program
   160→  .command('daemon')
   161→  .description('Manage the MemoryTree heartbeat lifecycle')
   162→
   163→daemon
   164→  .command('install')
   165→  .description('Register heartbeat with the OS scheduler')
   166→  .option('--interval <interval>', 'Override heartbeat interval (e.g., "5m")')
   167→  .option('--auto-push <bool>', 'Override auto_push setting (true/false)')
   168→  .action(async (opts) => {
   169→    const { cmdInstall } = await import('./cmd-daemon.js')
   170→    process.exitCode = cmdInstall({
   171→      interval: opts.interval,
   172→      autoPush: opts.autoPush,
   173→    })
   174→  })
   175→
   176→daemon
   177→  .command('uninstall')
   178→  .description('Remove the heartbeat scheduled task')
   179→  .action(async () => {
   180→    const { cmdUninstall } = await import('./cmd-daemon.js')
   181→    process.exitCode = cmdUninstall()
   182→  })
   183→
   184→daemon
   185→  .command('run-once')
   186→  .description('Execute a single heartbeat cycle now')
   187→  .action(async () => {
   188→    const { cmdRunOnce } = await import('./cmd-daemon.js')
   189→    process.exitCode = await cmdRunOnce()
   190→  })
   191→
   192→daemon
   193→  .command('watch')
   194→  .description('Continuous heartbeat loop (development only)')
   195→  .option('--interval <interval>', 'Override interval')
   196→  .action(async (opts) => {
   197→    const { cmdWatch } = await import('./cmd-daemon.js')
   198→    process.exitCode = await cmdWatch({ interval: opts.interval })
   199→  })
   200→
   201→daemon
   202→  .command('status')
   203→  .description('Show heartbeat registration and lock state')
   204→  .action(async () => {
   205→    const { cmdStatus } = await import('./cmd-daemon.js')
   206→    process.exitCode = cmdStatus()
   207→  })
   208→
   209→program.parse()
   210→

Tool Result #21 Read toolu_013TaiFHHzEYMBxdJwMAq9YR 11:02:03
Read output=1→/** 2→ * Statistics computation from ManifestEntry arrays. 3→ * All purely algorithmic — no I/O, no external deps. 4→ */ 5→ 6→import type { ManifestEntry } from '../types/tran...
Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * Statistics computation from ManifestEntry arrays.
     3→ * All purely algorithmic — no I/O, no external deps.
     4→ */
     5→
     6→import type { ManifestEntry } from '../types/transcript.js'
     7→import type { ReportStats } from '../types/report.js'
     8→
     9→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    10→// Main stats computation
    11→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    12→
    13→export function computeStats(
    14→  manifests: ManifestEntry[],
    15→  toolCounts: Record<string, number> = {},
    16→): ReportStats {
    17→  const totalSessions = manifests.length
    18→  let totalMessages = 0
    19→  let totalToolEvents = 0
    20→  const clientCounts: Record<string, number> = {}
    21→  const daySet = new Set<string>()
    22→
    23→  for (const m of manifests) {
    24→    totalMessages += m.message_count
    25→    totalToolEvents += m.tool_event_count
    26→
    27→    const client = m.client || 'unknown'
    28→    clientCounts[client] = (clientCounts[client] ?? 0) + 1
    29→
    30→    const day = isoDay(m.started_at)
    31→    if (day) daySet.add(day)
    32→  }
    33→
    34→  const dayBuckets = buildDayBuckets(manifests)
    35→  const weekBuckets = buildWeekBuckets(manifests)
    36→
    37→  const dates = manifests
    38→    .map(m => m.started_at)
    39→    .filter(Boolean)
    40→    .sort()
    41→
    42→  const from = dates[0] ?? ''
    43→  const to = dates[dates.length - 1] ?? ''
    44→
    45→  return {
    46→    totalSessions,
    47→    totalMessages,
    48→    totalToolEvents,
    49→    activeDays: daySet.size,
    50→    dateRange: { from, to },
    51→    clientCounts,
    52→    dayBuckets,
    53→    weekBuckets,
    54→    toolCounts,
    55→  }
    56→}
    57→
    58→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    59→// Day buckets: 'YYYY-MM-DD' → session count
    60→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    61→
    62→export function buildDayBuckets(manifests: ManifestEntry[]): Record<string, number> {
    63→  const buckets: Record<string, number> = {}
    64→  for (const m of manifests) {
    65→    const day = isoDay(m.started_at)
    66→    if (day) {
    67→      buckets[day] = (buckets[day] ?? 0) + 1
    68→    }
    69→  }
    70→  return buckets
    71→}
    72→
    73→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    74→// Week buckets: 'YYYY-WNN' → message count
    75→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    76→
    77→export function buildWeekBuckets(manifests: ManifestEntry[]): Record<string, number> {
    78→  const buckets: Record<string, number> = {}
    79→  for (const m of manifests) {
    80→    const week = isoWeek(m.started_at)
    81→    if (week) {
    82→      buckets[week] = (buckets[week] ?? 0) + m.message_count
    83→    }
    84→  }
    85→  return buckets
    86→}
    87→
    88→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    89→// Tool name extraction
    90→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    91→
    92→/**
    93→ * Extract tool names from tool event summary strings.
    94→ * Summary format is typically: "function_call input=..." or "Bash ..." etc.
    95→ */
    96→export function extractToolNames(summaries: string[]): string[] {
    97→  return summaries.map(s => {
    98→    const trimmed = s.trim()
    99→    // Try to extract first identifier word
   100→    const match = trimmed.match(/^([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_:-]*)/)
   101→    if (match?.[1]) {
   102→      return match[1]
   103→    }
   104→    return 'unknown'
   105→  })
   106→}
   107→
   108→/**
   109→ * Accumulate tool name counts into an existing map.
   110→ */
   111→export function accumulateToolCounts(
   112→  toolCounts: Record<string, number>,
   113→  names: string[],
   114→): Record<string, number> {
   115→  const result = { ...toolCounts }
   116→  for (const name of names) {
   117→    result[name] = (result[name] ?? 0) + 1
   118→  }
   119→  return result
   120→}
   121→
   122→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   123→// Internal helpers
   124→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   125→
   126→/** Extract 'YYYY-MM-DD' from an ISO timestamp. Returns '' if invalid. */
   127→function isoDay(ts: string): string {
   128→  if (!ts) return ''
   129→  const match = ts.match(/^(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2})/)
   130→  return match?.[1] ?? ''
   131→}
   132→
   133→/** Compute 'YYYY-WNN' ISO week string from an ISO timestamp. */
   134→function isoWeek(ts: string): string {
   135→  if (!ts) return ''
   136→  try {
   137→    const d = new Date(ts)
   138→    if (isNaN(d.getTime())) return ''
   139→    return isoWeekKey(d)
   140→  } catch {
   141→    return ''
   142→  }
   143→}
   144→
   145→/**
   146→ * Compute 'YYYY-WNN' ISO week key from a Date object.
   147→ * Exported so chart renderers can reuse without duplicating the formula.
   148→ */
   149→export function isoWeekKey(d: Date): string {
   150→  // ISO week: the week containing Thursday; Monday = week start
   151→  const thursday = new Date(d)
   152→  thursday.setDate(d.getDate() + (4 - ((d.getDay() + 6) % 7 + 1)))
   153→  const year = thursday.getFullYear()
   154→  const jan4 = new Date(year, 0, 4)
   155→  const week = Math.ceil(
   156→    ((thursday.getTime() - jan4.getTime()) / 86400000 + jan4.getDay() + 1) / 7,
   157→  )
   158→  return `${year}-W${String(week).padStart(2, '0')}`
   159→}
   160→
Tool Result #22 Read toolu_0124i43yFVdVggnWTsyUpQXd 11:02:03
Read output=1→/** 2→ * Report build orchestrator. 3→ * Generates a self-contained multi-page HTML website in Memory/07_reports/. 4→ */ 5→ 6→import { 7→ existsSync, 8→ mkdirSync, 9→ readdirS...
Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * Report build orchestrator.
     3→ * Generates a self-contained multi-page HTML website in Memory/07_reports/.
     4→ */
     5→
     6→import {
     7→  existsSync,
     8→  mkdirSync,
     9→  readdirSync,
    10→  readFileSync,
    11→  writeFileSync,
    12→  appendFileSync,
    13→  rmSync,
    14→} from 'node:fs'
    15→import { basename, dirname, join } from 'node:path'
    16→
    17→import type { BuildReportOptions } from '../types/report.js'
    18→import type { ManifestEntry } from '../types/transcript.js'
    19→import { computeStats, extractToolNames, accumulateToolCounts } from './stats.js'
    20→import { renderDashboard } from './render/dashboard.js'
    21→import { renderTranscriptList } from './render/transcript-list.js'
    22→import { renderTranscript } from './render/transcript.js'
    23→import type { RenderedMessage } from './render/transcript.js'
    24→import { renderKnowledge } from './render/knowledge.js'
    25→import { renderGoals } from './render/goals.js'
    26→import { renderTodos } from './render/todos.js'
    27→import { renderArchive } from './render/archive.js'
    28→import { renderProjects } from './render/projects.js'
    29→import { renderGraph } from './render/graph.js'
    30→import { buildSearchIndex, renderSearchPage } from './render/search.js'
    31→import { buildLinkGraph } from './render/links.js'
    32→import { renderRssFeed } from './render/rss.js'
    33→import { getSummary } from './summarize.js'
    34→import type { SummaryOptions } from './summarize.js'
    35→import { getTags } from './tags.js'
    36→import { loadLocale } from './i18n/index.js'
    37→import type { Translations } from './i18n/types.js'
    38→import { getLogger } from '../heartbeat/log.js'
    39→
    40→const DEFAULT_MODEL = 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001'
    41→
    42→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    43→// Main entry point
    44→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    45→
    46→export async function buildReport(options: BuildReportOptions): Promise<void> {
    47→  const { root, output } = options
    48→  const noAi = options.noAi ?? false
    49→  const model = options.model ?? DEFAULT_MODEL
    50→  const locale = options.locale ?? 'en'
    51→  const ghPagesBranch = options.ghPagesBranch ?? ''
    52→  const cname = options.cname ?? ''
    53→  const webhookUrl = options.webhookUrl ?? ''
    54→  const newSessionIds = options.newSessionIds ?? []
    55→  const reportBaseUrl = options.reportBaseUrl ?? ''
    56→
    57→  // Cache lives outside the gitignored output dir so it survives rm -rf
    58→  const cacheDir = join(root, 'Memory', '.report-cache')
    59→
    60→  // Load translations
    61→  const t: Translations = loadLocale(locale)
    62→
    63→  clearOutputDir(output)
    64→
    65→  // Ensure output dirs exist
    66→  mkdirSync(output, { recursive: true })
    67→  mkdirSync(join(output, 'transcripts'), { recursive: true })
    68→  mkdirSync(join(output, 'goals'), { recursive: true })
    69→  mkdirSync(join(output, 'knowledge'), { recursive: true })
    70→  mkdirSync(join(output, 'todos'), { recursive: true })
    71→  mkdirSync(join(output, 'archive'), { recursive: true })
    72→  mkdirSync(join(output, 'projects'), { recursive: true })
    73→  mkdirSync(cacheDir, { recursive: true })
    74→
    75→  // Ensure Memory/07_reports is gitignored
    76→  ensureGitignore(root, 'Memory/07_reports/')
    77→
    78→  // Load all manifests
    79→  const manifests = loadManifests(root)
    80→
    81→  // Build link graph from clean markdown
    82→  const linkGraph = buildLinkGraph(manifests, root)
    83→
    84→  // Accumulate tool counts while processing transcripts
    85→  let toolCounts: Record<string, number> = {}
    86→
    87→  // Summary options
    88→  const summaryOptions: SummaryOptions = { cacheDir, noAi, model }
    89→
    90→  // Process each transcript: parse → summarize → render → write → discard
    91→  const snippets: Record<string, string> = {}
    92→  const summaries: Record<string, string> = {}
    93→  const summaryPromises: Array<Promise<void>> = []
    94→
    95→  for (const m of manifests) {
    96→    const messages = parseCleanMarkdownMessages(m, root)
    97→
    98→    // Tool events from parsed transcript (try raw path)
    99→    const rawPath = resolveRawPath(m, root)
   100→    if (rawPath && existsSync(rawPath)) {
   101→      try {
   102→        const toolSummaries = extractToolSummariesFromRaw(rawPath, m.client)
   103→        const names = extractToolNames(toolSummaries)
   104→        toolCounts = accumulateToolCounts(toolCounts, names)
   105→      } catch {
   106→        // Skip if raw parsing fails
   107→      }
   108→    }
   109→
   110→    // Search snippet from first message text
   111→    const firstMsg = messages[0]
   112→    snippets[m.session_id] = firstMsg ? firstMsg.text.slice(0, 300) : ''
   113→
   114→    // Summarize + render (deferred to allow parallel API calls)
   115→    const manifest = m
   116→    const msgs = messages
   117→    summaryPromises.push(
   118→      (async () => {
   119→        try {
   120→        const summary = await getSummary(manifest.raw_sha256, msgs, summaryOptions)
   121→        summaries[manifest.session_id] = summary
   122→        const backlinkIds = linkGraph.backlinks[manifest.session_id] ?? []
   123→        const backlinkManifests = backlinkIds
   124→          .map(id => manifests.find(x => x.session_id === id))
   125→          .filter((x): x is ManifestEntry => x !== undefined)
   126→
   127→        const html = renderTranscript(msgs, manifest, summary, backlinkManifests, t, reportBaseUrl)
   128→        const outPath = transcriptOutputPath(output, manifest)
   129→        mkdirSync(dirname(outPath), { recursive: true })
   130→        writeFileSync(outPath, html, 'utf-8')
   131→        } catch (err: unknown) {
   132→          // eslint-disable-next-line no-console
   133→          getLogger().warn(`[build] Failed to render ${manifest.session_id}: ${String(err)}`)
   134→        }
   135→      })(),
   136→    )
   137→  }
   138→
   139→  // Wait for all transcript renders (parallel, bounded by semaphore in summarize.ts)
   140→  await Promise.all(summaryPromises)
   141→
   142→  // Extract tags in parallel (after summaries are ready)
   143→  const tagOptions = { cacheDir, noAi, model }
   144→  const tags: Record<string, string[]> = {}
   145→  await Promise.all(
   146→    manifests.map(async m => {
   147→      const summary = summaries[m.session_id] ?? ''
   148→      tags[m.session_id] = await getTags(m.raw_sha256, summary, tagOptions)
   149→    }),
   150→  )
   151→
   152→  // Compute final stats with accumulated tool counts
   153→  const stats = computeStats(manifests, toolCounts)
   154→
   155→  // Load markdown content for various pages
   156→  const goalFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '01_goals'))
   157→  const todoFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '02_todos'))
   158→  const knowledgeFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '04_knowledge'))
   159→  const archiveFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '05_archive'))
   160→
   161→  // Dashboard
   162→  writeFileSync(join(output, 'index.html'), renderDashboard(stats, manifests, t), 'utf-8')
   163→
   164→  // Session list
   165→  writeFileSync(
   166→    join(output, 'transcripts', 'index.html'),
   167→    renderTranscriptList(manifests, t, summaries, tags),
   168→    'utf-8',
   169→  )
   170→
   171→  // Goals page
   172→  writeFileSync(
   173→    join(output, 'goals', 'index.html'),
   174→    renderGoals(goalFiles, t),
   175→    'utf-8',
   176→  )
   177→
   178→  // Knowledge page
   179→  writeFileSync(
   180→    join(output, 'knowledge', 'index.html'),
   181→    renderKnowledge(knowledgeFiles, t),
   182→    'utf-8',
   183→  )
   184→
   185→  // Todos page
   186→  writeFileSync(
   187→    join(output, 'todos', 'index.html'),
   188→    renderTodos(todoFiles, t),
   189→    'utf-8',
   190→  )
   191→
   192→  // Archive page
   193→  writeFileSync(
   194→    join(output, 'archive', 'index.html'),
   195→    renderArchive(archiveFiles, t),
   196→    'utf-8',
   197→  )
   198→
   199→  // Projects page
   200→  writeFileSync(
   201→    join(output, 'projects', 'index.html'),
   202→    renderProjects(manifests, t),
   203→    'utf-8',
   204→  )
   205→
   206→  // Knowledge graph
   207→  writeFileSync(
   208→    join(output, 'graph.html'),
   209→    renderGraph(manifests, knowledgeFiles, linkGraph, t),
   210→    'utf-8',
   211→  )
   212→
   213→  // Search
   214→  const searchIndex = buildSearchIndex(manifests, m => snippets[m.session_id] ?? '')
   215→  writeFileSync(join(output, 'search.html'), renderSearchPage(searchIndex, t), 'utf-8')
   216→
   217→  // RSS Feed
   218→  writeFileSync(join(output, 'feed.xml'), renderRssFeed(manifests, summaries, reportBaseUrl), 'utf-8')
   219→
   220→  // GitHub Pages deployment (non-blocking on failure)
   221→  if (ghPagesBranch) {
   222→    try {
   223→      const { deployGithubPages } = await import('./deploy/github-pages.js')
   224→      await deployGithubPages({ repoRoot: root, outputDir: output, branch: ghPagesBranch, cname })
   225→    } catch {
   226→      // Logged inside deployGithubPages
   227→    }
   228→  } else if (cname) {
   229→    // Write CNAME even without deploy (writeFileSync already imported at top)
   230→    writeFileSync(join(output, 'CNAME'), cname + '\n', 'utf-8')
   231→  }
   232→
   233→  // Webhook notification (non-blocking on failure)
   234→  if (webhookUrl) {
   235→    try {
   236→      const { sendWebhook } = await import('./deploy/webhook.js')
   237→      await sendWebhook({
   238→        url: webhookUrl,
   239→        sessionCount: manifests.length,
   240→        newSessionIds,
   241→      })
   242→    } catch {
   243→      // Logged inside sendWebhook
   244→    }
   245→  }
   246→}
   247→
   248→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   249→// Manifest loading
   250→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   251→
   252→function loadManifests(root: string): ManifestEntry[] {
   253→  const manifestsDir = join(root, 'Memory', '06_transcripts', 'manifests')
   254→  if (!existsSync(manifestsDir)) return []
   255→
   256→  const manifests: ManifestEntry[] = []
   257→  loadManifestsRecursive(manifestsDir, manifests)
   258→  return manifests
   259→}
   260→
   261→function loadManifestsRecursive(dir: string, out: ManifestEntry[]): void {
   262→  let entries: string[]
   263→  try {
   264→    entries = readdirSync(dir)
   265→  } catch {
   266→    return
   267→  }
   268→
   269→  for (const entry of entries) {
   270→    const fullPath = join(dir, entry)
   271→    if (entry.endsWith('.json')) {
   272→      try {
   273→        const raw = readFileSync(fullPath, 'utf-8')
   274→        const parsed: unknown = JSON.parse(raw)
   275→        if (
   276→          parsed !== null &&
   277→          typeof parsed === 'object' &&
   278→          typeof (parsed as Record<string, unknown>)['session_id'] === 'string' &&
   279→          typeof (parsed as Record<string, unknown>)['client'] === 'string'
   280→        ) {
   281→          out.push(parsed as ManifestEntry)
   282→        }
   283→      } catch {
   284→        // Skip malformed manifests
   285→      }
   286→    } else {
   287→      // Recurse into subdirectories
   288→      loadManifestsRecursive(fullPath, out)
   289→    }
   290→  }
   291→}
   292→
   293→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   294→// Clean markdown message parsing
   295→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   296→
   297→/** Parse messages from a clean markdown file. */
   298→export function parseCleanMarkdownMessages(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): RenderedMessage[] {
   299→  const cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path
   300→    ? join(root, m.repo_clean_path)
   301→    : m.global_clean_path
   302→  if (!cleanPath || !existsSync(cleanPath)) return []
   303→
   304→  let content: string
   305→  try {
   306→    content = readFileSync(cleanPath, 'utf-8')
   307→  } catch {
   308→    return []
   309→  }
   310→
   311→  return parseMessagesFromMarkdown(content)
   312→}
   313→
   314→/** Extract role/timestamp/text from clean markdown format. */
   315→export function parseMessagesFromMarkdown(content: string): RenderedMessage[] {
   316→  const messages: RenderedMessage[] = []
   317→
   318→  // Find ## Messages section
   319→  const msgSection = content.indexOf('\n## Messages')
   320→  if (msgSection === -1) return []
   321→
   322→  const body = content.slice(msgSection + 12) // after "## Messages\n"
   323→
   324→  // Split on ### N. role headers
   325→  const msgRe = /^### \d+\.\s+(\w+)/gm
   326→  let match: RegExpExecArray | null
   327→  const starts: Array<{ index: number; role: string }> = []
   328→
   329→  while ((match = msgRe.exec(body)) !== null) {
   330→    starts.push({ index: match.index, role: match[1] ?? 'unknown' })
   331→  }
   332→
   333→  for (let i = 0; i < starts.length; i++) {
   334→    const start = starts[i]
   335→    if (!start) continue
   336→    const nextStart = starts[i + 1]
   337→    const chunk = nextStart
   338→      ? body.slice(start.index, nextStart.index)
   339→      : body.slice(start.index)
   340→
   341→    const lines = chunk.split('\n')
   342→    // First line is the header, second may be timestamp
   343→    let timestamp = ''
   344→    const textLines: string[] = []
   345→    let pastHeader = false
   346→
   347→    for (const line of lines) {
   348→      if (!pastHeader && line.startsWith('### ')) {
   349→        pastHeader = true
   350→        continue
   351→      }
   352→      if (!pastHeader) continue
   353→      const tsMatch = line.match(/^- Timestamp:\s*`([^`]+)`/)
   354→      if (tsMatch && !timestamp) {
   355→        timestamp = tsMatch[1] ?? ''
   356→        continue
   357→      }
   358→      textLines.push(line)
   359→    }
   360→
   361→    // Remove leading/trailing blank lines from text
   362→    const text = textLines.join('\n').trim()
   363→    if (text || timestamp) {
   364→      messages.push({ role: start.role, timestamp, text })
   365→    }
   366→  }
   367→
   368→  return messages
   369→}
   370→
   371→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   372→// Raw transcript tool extraction
   373→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   374→
   375→/** Best-effort extraction of tool event summaries from a raw JSONL file. */
   376→function extractToolSummariesFromRaw(rawPath: string, _client: string): string[] {
   377→  const summaries: string[] = []
   378→  let content: string
   379→  try {
   380→    content = readFileSync(rawPath, 'utf-8')
   381→  } catch {
   382→    return []
   383→  }
   384→
   385→  for (const line of content.split('\n')) {
   386→    const trimmed = line.trim()
   387→    if (!trimmed) continue
   388→    try {
   389→      const record = JSON.parse(trimmed) as Record<string, unknown>
   390→      // Codex: function_call type
   391→      const type = record['type'] as string | undefined
   392→      if (type === 'function_call' || type === 'custom_tool_call') {
   393→        const name = (record['name'] as string | undefined) ?? type
   394→        summaries.push(name)
   395→        continue
   396→      }
   397→      // Claude: tool_use content blocks
   398→      const payload = record['message'] as Record<string, unknown> | undefined
   399→      const content2 = (payload?.['content'] ?? record['content']) as unknown[] | undefined
   400→      if (Array.isArray(content2)) {
   401→        for (const block of content2) {
   402→          if (
   403→            block !== null &&
   404→            typeof block === 'object' &&
   405→            (block as Record<string, unknown>)['type'] === 'tool_use'
   406→          ) {
   407→            const name = ((block as Record<string, unknown>)['name'] as string | undefined) ?? 'tool_use'
   408→            summaries.push(name)
   409→          }
   410→        }
   411→      }
   412→    } catch {
   413→      // Skip malformed lines
   414→    }
   415→  }
   416→
   417→  return summaries
   418→}
   419→
   420→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   421→// Output path helpers
   422→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   423→
   424→function transcriptOutputPath(output: string, m: ManifestEntry): string {
   425→  const cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path || m.global_clean_path || ''
   426→  const stem = cleanPath ? basename(cleanPath, '.md') : m.session_id
   427→  return join(output, 'transcripts', m.client, `${stem}.html`)
   428→}
   429→
   430→function resolveRawPath(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): string | null {
   431→  if (m.repo_raw_path) {
   432→    return join(root, m.repo_raw_path)
   433→  }
   434→  if (m.global_raw_path) {
   435→    return m.global_raw_path
   436→  }
   437→  return null
   438→}
   439→
   440→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   441→// Markdown file loader (for goals/knowledge/todos/archive)
   442→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   443→
   444→function loadMarkdownFiles(dir: string): Array<{ filename: string; title: string; content: string }> {
   445→  if (!existsSync(dir)) return []
   446→
   447→  let entries: string[]
   448→  try {
   449→    entries = readdirSync(dir)
   450→  } catch {
   451→    return []
   452→  }
   453→
   454→  return entries
   455→    .filter(e => e.endsWith('.md'))
   456→    .sort()
   457→    .map(filename => {
   458→      const fullPath = join(dir, filename)
   459→      let content = ''
   460→      try {
   461→        content = readFileSync(fullPath, 'utf-8')
   462→      } catch {
   463→        // empty
   464→      }
   465→      const title = extractMarkdownTitle(content) || basename(filename, '.md')
   466→      return { filename, title, content }
   467→    })
   468→}
   469→
   470→function clearOutputDir(output: string): void {
   471→  if (!existsSync(output)) return
   472→
   473→  let entries: string[]
   474→  try {
   475→    entries = readdirSync(output)
   476→  } catch {
   477→    return
   478→  }
   479→
   480→  for (const entry of entries) {
   481→    try {
   482→      rmSync(join(output, entry), { recursive: true, force: true })
   483→    } catch {
   484→      // Best-effort cleanup
   485→    }
   486→  }
   487→}
   488→
   489→function extractMarkdownTitle(content: string): string {
   490→  const match = content.match(/^#\s+(.+)$/m)
   491→  return match?.[1]?.trim() ?? ''
   492→}
   493→
   494→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   495→// .gitignore management
   496→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   497→
   498→export function ensureGitignore(root: string, entry: string): void {
   499→  const gitignorePath = join(root, '.gitignore')
   500→  let existing = ''
   501→  if (existsSync(gitignorePath)) {
   502→    try {
   503→      existing = readFileSync(gitignorePath, 'utf-8')
   504→    } catch {
   505→      return
   506→    }
   507→  }
   508→  // Check if already present (normalize line endings)
   509→  const lines = existing.replace(/\r\n/g, '\n').split('\n')
   510→  if (lines.some(l => l.trim() === entry.trim())) return
   511→
   512→  // Append with trailing newline
   513→  const append = existing.endsWith('\n') ? entry + '\n' : '\n' + entry + '\n'
   514→  try {
   515→    appendFileSync(gitignorePath, append, 'utf-8')
   516→  } catch {
   517→    // Best-effort
   518→  }
   519→}
   520→

Read output=1→/** 2→ * AI summary generation with SHA256-based caching. 3→ * Falls back gracefully when API key is absent or SDK is missing. 4→ */ 5→ 6→import { existsSync, mkdirSync, readF...
Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * AI summary generation with SHA256-based caching.
     3→ * Falls back gracefully when API key is absent or SDK is missing.
     4→ */
     5→
     6→import { existsSync, mkdirSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync } from 'node:fs'
     7→import { join } from 'node:path'
     8→
     9→import type { SummaryCache } from '../types/report.js'
    10→
    11→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    12→// Types
    13→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    14→
    15→export interface SummaryMessage {
    16→  role: string
    17→  text: string
    18→}
    19→
    20→export interface SummaryOptions {
    21→  cacheDir: string
    22→  noAi: boolean
    23→  model: string
    24→}
    25→
    26→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    27→// Semaphore (max 5 concurrent AI calls)
    28→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    29→
    30→let activeCalls = 0
    31→const MAX_CONCURRENT = 5
    32→
    33→async function withSemaphore<T>(fn: () => Promise<T>): Promise<T> {
    34→  while (activeCalls >= MAX_CONCURRENT) {
    35→    await new Promise<void>(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 100))
    36→  }
    37→  activeCalls++
    38→  try {
    39→    return await fn()
    40→  } finally {
    41→    activeCalls--
    42→  }
    43→}
    44→
    45→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    46→// Main entry point
    47→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    48→
    49→export async function getSummary(
    50→  sha256: string,
    51→  messages: SummaryMessage[],
    52→  options: SummaryOptions,
    53→): Promise<string> {
    54→  // Check cache
    55→  const cached = readCache(sha256, options.cacheDir)
    56→  if (cached !== null) {
    57→    return cached
    58→  }
    59→
    60→  if (options.noAi) return ''
    61→
    62→  const apiKey = process.env['ANTHROPIC_API_KEY']
    63→  if (!apiKey) return ''
    64→
    65→  return withSemaphore(() => callApi(sha256, messages, options))
    66→}
    67→
    68→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    69→// API call
    70→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    71→
    72→async function callApi(
    73→  sha256: string,
    74→  messages: SummaryMessage[],
    75→  options: SummaryOptions,
    76→): Promise<string> {
    77→  try {
    78→    // Dynamic import so the build never fails if @anthropic-ai/sdk is absent
    79→    const { default: Anthropic } = await (import('@anthropic-ai/sdk') as Promise<{ default: typeof import('@anthropic-ai/sdk').default }>)
    80→
    81→    const client = new Anthropic()
    82→    const prompt = buildSummaryPrompt(messages)
    83→
    84→    const response = await client.messages.create({
    85→      model: options.model,
    86→      max_tokens: 200,
    87→      system:
    88→        'Summarize in 2-3 sentences. What was accomplished? What problems were solved? Be specific. Use past tense.',
    89→      messages: [{ role: 'user', content: prompt }],
    90→    })
    91→
    92→    const block = response.content[0]
    93→    const text = block && block.type === 'text' ? block.text : ''
    94→    if (text) {
    95→      writeCache(sha256, text, options.cacheDir)
    96→    }
    97→    return text
    98→  } catch (err: unknown) {
    99→    // MODULE_NOT_FOUND or any API error — never crash the build
   100→    const code = (err as NodeJS.ErrnoException).code
   101→    if (code !== 'MODULE_NOT_FOUND') {
   102→      console.warn(`[summarize] API call failed: ${String(err)}`)
   103→    }
   104→    return ''
   105→  }
   106→}
   107→
   108→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   109→// Prompt construction
   110→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   111→
   112→/** First 30 messages, each truncated to 500 chars. */
   113→export function buildSummaryPrompt(messages: SummaryMessage[]): string {
   114→  const slice = messages.slice(0, 30)
   115→  const lines = slice.map(m => {
   116→    const text = m.text.slice(0, 500)
   117→    return `${m.role.toUpperCase()}: ${text}`
   118→  })
   119→  return lines.join('\n\n')
   120→}
   121→
   122→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   123→// Cache read / write
   124→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   125→
   126→export function readCache(sha256: string, cacheDir: string): string | null {
   127→  const path = cachePath(sha256, cacheDir)
   128→  if (!existsSync(path)) return null
   129→  try {
   130→    const raw = readFileSync(path, 'utf-8')
   131→    const entry = JSON.parse(raw) as SummaryCache
   132→    return entry.summary ?? null
   133→  } catch {
   134→    return null
   135→  }
   136→}
   137→
   138→export function writeCache(sha256: string, summary: string, cacheDir: string): void {
   139→  try {
   140→    mkdirSync(cacheDir, { recursive: true })
   141→    const entry: SummaryCache = {
   142→      sha256,
   143→      summary,
   144→      generated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   145→    }
   146→    writeFileSync(cachePath(sha256, cacheDir), JSON.stringify(entry, null, 2) + '\n', 'utf-8')
   147→  } catch {
   148→    // Never crash on cache write failure
   149→  }
   150→}
   151→
   152→function cachePath(sha256: string, cacheDir: string): string {
   153→  return join(cacheDir, `${sha256}.json`)
   154→}
   155→
Tool Result #26 Read toolu_01TiwauHZCEQWEEiNtjwRdPi 11:02:12
Read output=1→/** 2→ * AI tag extraction with SHA256-based caching. 3→ * Extracts 3–5 keyword tags from a session summary using Claude. 4→ * Falls back to [] when noAi=true, API key absent,...
Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * AI tag extraction with SHA256-based caching.
     3→ * Extracts 3–5 keyword tags from a session summary using Claude.
     4→ * Falls back to [] when noAi=true, API key absent, or any error occurs.
     5→ */
     6→
     7→import { existsSync, mkdirSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync } from 'node:fs'
     8→import { join } from 'node:path'
     9→import { escHtml } from './render/layout.js'
    10→
    11→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    12→// Types
    13→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    14→
    15→export interface TagOptions {
    16→  cacheDir: string
    17→  noAi: boolean
    18→  model: string
    19→}
    20→
    21→interface TagCache {
    22→  sha256: string
    23→  tags: string[]
    24→  generated_at: string
    25→}
    26→
    27→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    28→// Main entry point
    29→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    30→
    31→export async function getTags(
    32→  sha256: string,
    33→  summary: string,
    34→  options: TagOptions,
    35→): Promise<string[]> {
    36→  // noAi mode: skip entirely
    37→  if (options.noAi) return []
    38→
    39→  // No summary → nothing to tag
    40→  if (!summary.trim()) return []
    41→
    42→  // Check cache first
    43→  const cached = readTagCache(sha256, options.cacheDir)
    44→  if (cached !== null) return cached
    45→
    46→  const apiKey = process.env['ANTHROPIC_API_KEY']
    47→  if (!apiKey) return []
    48→
    49→  return callTagApi(sha256, summary, options)
    50→}
    51→
    52→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    53→// API call
    54→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    55→
    56→async function callTagApi(
    57→  sha256: string,
    58→  summary: string,
    59→  options: TagOptions,
    60→): Promise<string[]> {
    61→  try {
    62→    const { default: Anthropic } = await (import('@anthropic-ai/sdk') as Promise<{ default: typeof import('@anthropic-ai/sdk').default }>)
    63→
    64→    const client = new Anthropic()
    65→    const response = await client.messages.create({
    66→      model: options.model,
    67→      max_tokens: 60,
    68→      system: 'You are a tag extractor. Respond with a JSON array only — no prose, no markdown.',
    69→      messages: [
    70→        {
    71→          role: 'user',
    72→          content: `Extract 3-5 short keyword tags from this session summary. Respond with JSON array only: ["tag1","tag2"]\n\n${summary.slice(0, 500)}`,
    73→        },
    74→      ],
    75→    })
    76→
    77→    const block = response.content[0]
    78→    const text = block && block.type === 'text' ? block.text.trim() : ''
    79→    if (!text) return []
    80→
    81→    const parsed: unknown = JSON.parse(text)
    82→    if (!Array.isArray(parsed)) return []
    83→
    84→    const tags = parsed
    85→      .filter((t): t is string => typeof t === 'string' && t.length > 0 && t.length <= 50)
    86→      .slice(0, 5)
    87→      .map(t => t.trim().toLowerCase())
    88→      .filter(t => t.length > 0)
    89→
    90→    if (tags.length > 0) {
    91→      writeTagCache(sha256, tags, options.cacheDir)
    92→    }
    93→    return tags
    94→  } catch {
    95→    // Never crash — API errors, JSON parse errors, missing SDK
    96→    return []
    97→  }
    98→}
    99→
   100→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   101→// Rendering
   102→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   103→
   104→/** Render tags as pill badges. Returns '' for empty array. */
   105→export function renderTagBadges(tags: string[]): string {
   106→  if (tags.length === 0) return ''
   107→  const pills = tags
   108→    .map(t => `<span class="tag" data-tag="${escHtml(t)}">${escHtml(t)}</span>`)
   109→    .join('')
   110→  return `<div class="tag-list">${pills}</div>`
   111→}
   112→
   113→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   114→// Cache helpers
   115→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   116→
   117→function readTagCache(sha256: string, cacheDir: string): string[] | null {
   118→  const path = tagCachePath(sha256, cacheDir)
   119→  if (!existsSync(path)) return null
   120→  try {
   121→    const raw = readFileSync(path, 'utf-8')
   122→    const entry = JSON.parse(raw) as TagCache
   123→    return Array.isArray(entry.tags) ? entry.tags : null
   124→  } catch {
   125→    return null
   126→  }
   127→}
   128→
   129→function writeTagCache(sha256: string, tags: string[], cacheDir: string): void {
   130→  try {
   131→    const tagsDir = join(cacheDir, 'tags')
   132→    mkdirSync(tagsDir, { recursive: true })
   133→    const entry: TagCache = { sha256, tags, generated_at: new Date().toISOString() }
   134→    writeFileSync(tagCachePath(sha256, cacheDir), JSON.stringify(entry, null, 2) + '\n', 'utf-8')
   135→  } catch {
   136→    // Best-effort
   137→  }
   138→}
   139→
   140→function tagCachePath(sha256: string, cacheDir: string): string {
   141→  return join(cacheDir, 'tags', `${sha256}.json`)
   142→}
   143→

1→/**
     2→ * Type definitions for the report generation subsystem.
     3→ */
     4→
     5→export interface ReportStats {
     6→  totalSessions: number
     7→  totalMessages: number
     8→  totalToolEvents: number
     9→  activeDays: number
    10→  dateRange: { from: string; to: string }
    11→  clientCounts: Record<string, number>
    12→  /** 'YYYY-MM-DD' → session count */
    13→  dayBuckets: Record<string, number>
    14→  /** 'YYYY-WNN' → message count */
    15→  weekBuckets: Record<string, number>
    16→  /** tool name → invocation count */
    17→  toolCounts: Record<string, number>
    18→}
    19→
    20→export interface SummaryCache {
    21→  sha256: string
    22→  summary: string
    23→  generated_at: string
    24→}
    25→
    26→export interface LinkGraph {
    27→  /** session_id → list of session_ids that reference it */
    28→  backlinks: Record<string, string[]>
    29→  /** session_id → list of session_ids it references */
    30→  forwardLinks: Record<string, string[]>
    31→}
    32→
    33→export interface SearchIndexEntry {
    34→  url: string
    35→  title: string
    36→  client: string
    37→  /** Last path segment of ManifestEntry.cwd (e.g. 'openmnemo') */
    38→  project: string
    39→  date: string
    40→  snippet: string
    41→}
    42→
    43→export interface BuildReportOptions {
    44→  root: string
    45→  output: string
    46→  noAi?: boolean
    47→  model?: string
    48→  /** Build-time locale (e.g. 'en', 'zh-CN'). Default: 'en'. */
    49→  locale?: string
    50→  /** gh-pages branch name. Empty string = skip deploy. Default: ''. */
    51→  ghPagesBranch?: string
    52→  /** Custom domain for CNAME file. Empty string = skip. Default: ''. */
    53→  cname?: string
    54→  /** Webhook URL for post-build notifications. Empty string = skip. Default: ''. */
    55→  webhookUrl?: string
    56→  /** Session IDs newly imported in this heartbeat cycle (for webhook). */
    57→  newSessionIds?: string[]
    58→  /** Absolute base URL for RSS/OG links (e.g. 'https://memory.example.com'). Empty = skip. */
    59→  reportBaseUrl?: string
    60→}
    61→
Tool Result #30 Read toolu_01RqPFzpAv2YwaNRVVYwczGf 11:02:21
Read output=1→/** 2→ * CLI adapters for `memorytree report build` and `memorytree report serve`. 3→ */ 4→ 5→import { createServer } from 'node:http' 6→import { createReadStream, existsSync,...
Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * CLI adapters for `memorytree report build` and `memorytree report serve`.
     3→ */
     4→
     5→import { createServer } from 'node:http'
     6→import { createReadStream, existsSync, statSync } from 'node:fs'
     7→import { extname, join, resolve, sep } from 'node:path'
     8→
     9→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    10→// Build command
    11→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    12→
    13→export interface CmdReportBuildOptions {
    14→  root: string
    15→  output: string
    16→  noAi: boolean
    17→  model: string
    18→  locale?: string
    19→  reportBaseUrl?: string
    20→}
    21→
    22→export async function cmdReportBuild(opts: CmdReportBuildOptions): Promise<number> {
    23→  const { buildReport } = await import('../report/build.js')
    24→  try {
    25→    const buildOptions = {
    26→      root: resolve(opts.root),
    27→      output: resolve(opts.output),
    28→      noAi: opts.noAi,
    29→      model: opts.model,
    30→      ...(opts.locale ? { locale: opts.locale } : {}),
    31→      ...(opts.reportBaseUrl ? { reportBaseUrl: opts.reportBaseUrl } : {}),
    32→    }
    33→    await buildReport(buildOptions)
    34→    console.log(`Report generated at: ${resolve(opts.output)}`)
    35→    console.log(`Open: ${join(resolve(opts.output), 'index.html')}`)
    36→    return 0
    37→  } catch (err: unknown) {
    38→    console.error(`Report build failed: ${String(err)}`)
    39→    return 1
    40→  }
    41→}
    42→
    43→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    44→// Serve command
    45→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    46→
    47→export interface CmdReportServeOptions {
    48→  dir: string
    49→  port: number
    50→}
    51→
    52→export function cmdReportServe(opts: CmdReportServeOptions): number {
    53→  const root = resolve(opts.dir)
    54→  const port = opts.port
    55→
    56→  const MIME: Record<string, string> = {
    57→    '.html': 'text/html; charset=utf-8',
    58→    '.css': 'text/css',
    59→    '.js': 'application/javascript',
    60→    '.json': 'application/json',
    61→    '.svg': 'image/svg+xml',
    62→    '.ico': 'image/x-icon',
    63→  }
    64→
    65→  const server = createServer((req, res) => {
    66→    let urlPath: string
    67→    try {
    68→      urlPath = decodeURIComponent((req.url ?? '/').split('?')[0] ?? '/')
    69→    } catch {
    70→      res.writeHead(400, { 'Content-Type': 'text/plain' })
    71→      res.end('Bad request')
    72→      return
    73→    }
    74→
    75→    let filePath = join(root, urlPath)
    76→
    77→    // Containment check: reject paths that escape the serve root
    78→    // Use sep (\ on Windows, / on Unix) so the check works cross-platform.
    79→    if (!filePath.startsWith(root + sep) && filePath !== root) {
    80→      res.writeHead(403, { 'Content-Type': 'text/plain' })
    81→      res.end('Forbidden')
    82→      return
    83→    }
    84→
    85→    // Serve index.html for directory requests
    86→    if (existsSync(filePath) && statSync(filePath).isDirectory()) {
    87→      filePath = join(filePath, 'index.html')
    88→    }
    89→
    90→    if (!existsSync(filePath)) {
    91→      res.writeHead(404, { 'Content-Type': 'text/plain' })
    92→      res.end('Not found')
    93→      return
    94→    }
    95→
    96→    const ext = extname(filePath)
    97→    const contentType = MIME[ext] ?? 'application/octet-stream'
    98→    res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': contentType })
    99→    const stream = createReadStream(filePath)
   100→    stream.on('error', () => { res.destroy() })
   101→    stream.pipe(res)
   102→  })
   103→
   104→  server.on('error', (err: NodeJS.ErrnoException) => {
   105→    if (err.code === 'EADDRINUSE') {
   106→      console.error(`Error: port ${port} is already in use.`)
   107→      process.exit(1)
   108→    }
   109→    console.error(`Server error: ${String(err)}`)
   110→    process.exit(1)
   111→  })
   112→
   113→  server.listen(port, () => {
   114→    console.log(`Serving ${root}`)
   115→    console.log(`Open: http://localhost:${port}/`)
   116→    console.log('Press Ctrl+C to stop.')
   117→  })
   118→
   119→  return 0
   120→}
   121→
